emails.subject: eSpeak
emails.body: eSpeak So, after last Wednseday's Espeak with Danny, what is the future of the pipelines? mcs

emails.subject: eSpeak
emails.body: eSpeak So, after last Wednseday's Espeak with Danny, what is the future of the pipelines? mcs

emails.subject: Re: eSpeak
emails.body: Re: eSpeak Sorry, I missed it! I haven't been briefed yet on what the plan is. I assume we have one, however. If anyone tells me what it is, I may be in a position to explain it to you. DF Mark Schroeder@ECT 10/29/2000 03:50 AM
